### Notes
- Always taste as you cook, not just at the end. Your taste buds are the most important tool in the kitchen. #fieldnotes/cooking
- The trick with pasta water is to salt it until it tastes like the sea. #fieldnotes/cooking
	- Seriously, way more salt than you think
	- This seasons the pasta from the inside
